name: Holiday Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the white sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract to the mixture. Beat well after each addition.
3. Sift in the baking powder, soda, salt, rolled oats, cornflakes, peanuts, chocolate chips, and orange rind. Mix until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 12-15 minutes, or until edges are lightly golden brown.
6. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
